title: broadcast_to_group membership re-check before offline enqueue prevents ghost delivery
description: state.rs broadcast_to_group() calls store.is_group_member() before enqueuing for offline members. This prevents delivery to members who left (GROUP_LEAVE) between the list_group_members() call at the start of GROUP_SEND and the offline enqueue. A contributor might remove this second DB check as 'redundant' — it is not. Without it, a departing member can receive group messages they were already removed from. The check is load-bearing for group leave semantics.
